allow: Bash(pkill -f "manage.py runserver" 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; pgrep -f "manage.py runserver" || echo "old process killed")
Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -m ensurepip 2>&1 && .venv/bin/python3 -m pip install requests beautifulsoup4 lxml 2>&1)
Bash(PYTHONPATH=.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages python3 -c "import httpx; print\('httpx ok'\); import django; print\('django ok'\)")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages python3 -c "
import html.parser
print\('html.parser ok'\)
import re
print\('re ok'\)
")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python3 -c "
from alibabacloud_dysmsapi20170525.client import Client

")
